title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel

content.problemStatement:
Everybody is sad, most of all Monica as Chandler must spend Christmas and New Years in Tulsa, where his staff is all depressed they can't be with their families. He arranged for the head office to send a bonus, but even that's another bummer: donations in their name to the New York ballet. Chandler sends a message to the head office in the form of a binary code, which somehow gets changed on the way.

Chef is given two binary strings SSS and TTT of lengths NNN and MMM respectively. We can perform the following operations on string SSS.


Select two adjacent characters of the string SSS and flip these two characters. ( Flipping the character 111 is equivalent to replacing the character 111 with 000, and vice-versa )
Add a character, either 000 or 111 to any of the ends ( either the front or the back ) of the string SSS.
Find the minimum number of operations needed to convert SSS to TTT. If it is impossible to convert SSS to TTT, print **-1**.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
First line of each testcase contains of a single line of input, two integers N,MN, MN,M.
Second line of each testcase contains a binary string SSS.
Third line of each testcase contains a binary string TTT.


Output Format
For each testcase, output in a single line the minimum number of operations needed to convert SSS to TTT. If it is impossible to convert, print **-1**.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1: Flip the first two bits in one move and second two bits in second move. 101101101 ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí  011011011 ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí 000000000.
Test case 2: It is impossible to convert SSS to TTT using any sequence of moves.
